vllm.title: [Docs] Add acknowledgment for sponsors
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds a section in readme and documentation thanking the company helping vLLM with compute needs.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Codespell ignore `build/` directory
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds the build/ directory to the ignore list of codespell. This directory is present after building binaries when installing from source.
Before this change, if you run ./format.sh --all we will fail during the codespell check and report many issues like:
./build/temp.linux-x86_64-3.10/CMakeFiles/3.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Dynamic RoPE scaling
vllm.author: sasha0552
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In #555, @WoosukKwon removed dynamic specifying of RoPE scaling with the comment:

As we discussed offline, I removed rope_scaling from ModelConfig and EngineArgs. Now rope_scaling is always read from the model's config.json.
